response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with a long, progressively senior full-stack career centered on TypeScript/Node.js, plus recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, test frameworks authored, workshops taught), database, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS CDK experience align well. Main gaps are no stated Nest.js or Kotlin experience and a notable career investment in the niche D language, but the demonstrated polyglot adaptability makes these low-risk.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience at senior/staff level, including high-scale systems
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, teaching and community workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
Significant focus on niche DLang ecosystem; frontend depth in React is lightly evidenced (Ember-heavy history)
